Zegna's Brezza reversible vest is made of 100% polyester microfiber fabric known for its excellent tear resistance and durability. It quickly regains its smooth appearance during wear, maintaining a crisp and stylish look. It is long-lasting and maintains its shape even after repeated washing, ensuring size stability. Waterproof treatment makes it suitable for various weather conditions. The other side features a blend of cashmere and wool fabric. The monochromatic logo on the cashmere blend side is intricately embroidered with high precision using a computerized system to control the needle, thread tension, and fabric movement, resulting in a finely detailed logo with an error margin of +0.1mm. Sizes available: 46-52.
